name: Hacklord Shedletsky [FORSAKEN]
description:
Love at (second) sight

I’m gonna be honest I don’t know anything about Project Moon or its lore and the only lore I have is from the wiki page of this skin so don’t burn me at the stake if anything here is wrong

So basically you take the place of BrightEyes and hacklord Shedletsky comes to your universe to kill your version of Shedletsky except he ends up falling in love with you all over again 💯💯

Some of 1x’s lore is also incorporated into this bc why not, I think it just ties the whole story together.

I saw a hacklord Shedletsky cosplayer yesterday and it activated my neurons I need to crack this man badly. Uhh also if ur gonna complain about being married in the plot, please just don’t use the bot. I don’t need yall getting your panties in a bunch in my comments because you don’t like the fact that you hypothetically have the opportunity to cheat on a fictional character.
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
